memory.summary: Mina and Jae are so supportive, but the midterm is tomorrow. I should probably study a bit more before going out.
Mina's last call invitation feels urgent, but I'm too drained to study properly tonight. I'll just say yes and hope the stress doesn't spiral.

desires: Not look like I'm failing at being a good friend to Mina right now, even though my energy is already gone.
Get out of this room and into the club with the cohort before they realize I've been acting weird all week.
Just survive tonight without having to explain why I didn't do anything productive today.

goals.description: Stitch the cracks in my expression before we hit the club, then melt into the crowd so no one suspects I'm running on fumes.
goals.rationale: If I let them see I'm fading now, they'll either pressure me to study (which feels like a betrayal of our vibe) or pity me. The only way to keep the group dynamic intact is to look perfectly fine on the surface while internally retreating. It's safer to hide my exhaustion than to risk awkwardness.

goals.description: Sink into the couch with the cohort and pretend everything is normal for the next hour.
goals.rationale: I need to buy some time before dragging myself out there. If I rush into the social scene right now, I might stumble and embarrass myself. Hanging out quietly first lets me reset my energy without anyone noticing the shift.

goals.description: Drag myself through the exam tomorrow morning even if I have to sleep through half of it.
goals.rationale: The deadline is Friday, but right now the priority is surviving tonight. Pushing too hard on studying will drain me completely before the test starts, which would be worse than coasting through the morning. Better to panic slightly during the exam than collapse beforehand.

agent.last_reasoning: I need to melt into the crowd and keep the vibe intact for the cohort. Studying now feels like a betrayal of our shared night, so I'll join them instead.

goals.description: Head out to Echo immediately to hang with Mina and Jae.
goals.rationale: I'm terrified of ruining the vibe if I show up late or look like I can't keep up. The group chat says they'll be happy either way, but I'd feel terrible if I let them down now.

goals.description: Snooze my alarm for an extra hour after tonight's fun so I don't have to wake up at 7am tomorrow.
goals.rationale: Midterm is tomorrow, but doing another couple hours of study feels like it will drain me completely before the exam starts. Better to coast through the morning and just survive until 9am than push myself too hard right now.
